title: PR command rejects non-numeric PR identifiers
description: Black-box smoke for `armature pr <number>` when the provided PR token is not a valid integer.
input: Run `armature pr abc` and verify the CLI reports the invalid PR number and exits with status 1 before touching GitHub CLI flows.
command:
bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_ROOT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_ROOT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_ROOT/bin" "$TMP_ROOT/home"; ln -s "$(command -v node)" "$TMP_ROOT/bin/node"; OUTPUT=$(env -i PATH="$TMP_ROOT/bin" HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home" node dist/bin/armature.js pr abc 2>&1; STATUS=$?; printf "status=%s
%s
" "$STATUS" "$OUTPUT"); printf "%s
" "$OUTPUT"; printf "%s" "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "status=1"'
